Title: Successful User Registration
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: Test@123
- Email: test@example.com
- Privacy Document Accepted: Yes
Test Steps:
1. User inserts data and accepts privacy document.
2. User attempts to insert themselves into the database.
3. Database responds with success.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and receives a success response.

Title: Failed User Registration
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: Test@123
- Email: invalid_email
- Privacy Document Accepted: Yes
Test Steps:
1. User inserts data and accepts privacy document.
2. User attempts to insert themselves into the database.
3. Database responds with failure due to invalid email format.
Expected Result: User registration fails and receives a failure response.

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: User is registered and not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User inserts username and password.
2. User sends a sign-in request to the database.
3. Database verifies credentials and responds with success.
4. User is redirected to the main page.
Expected Result: User logs in successfully and is redirected to the main page.

Title: Failed User Login
Preconditions: User is registered but entered incorrect password.
Test Steps:
1. User inserts username and password.
2. User sends a sign-in request to the database.
3. Database verifies credentials and responds with failure.
4. User remains on the login page.
Expected Result: User login fails and remains on the login page.

Title: Display User Items List
Test Steps:
1. User initiates action to move to MyBoard activity.
2. MyBoard requests user items from the database.
3. Database sends user items to MyBoard.
4. MyBoard displays the list of items to the user.
Expected Result: User sees a list of their items.

Title: Add New Item to Database
Test Data:
- Item Name: NewItem
- Item Description: This is a new item
- Image URL: http://example.com/image.jpg
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on insert item button.
2. InsertNewItem requests an image and item info from the database.
3. Database inserts the item and sends a response back to the user.
4. User displays the updated list of items.
Expected Result: New item is added to the database and shown in the list.

Title: Delete Item from Database
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the list.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on delete item button.
2. InsertNewItem sends "Requires confirmation" message to Utente.
3. Utente confirms.
4. InsertNewItem sends "Confirm" message to Utente.
5. InsertNewItem sends "delete item from Database" message to Database.
6. Database sends "Response" message to InsertNewItem.
7. InsertNewItem sends "Show items list without the deleted one" message to Utente.
Expected Result: Item is deleted from the database and removed from the list.

Title: Get Items List from Database
Test Steps:
1. Utente sends "Get items from Database" message to Main.
2. Main sends "Get items from Database" message to Database.
3. Database sends "Response" message to Main.
4. Main sends "Show items list" message to Utente.
Expected Result: User sees a list of items retrieved from the database.

Title: Propose New Exchange
Test Data: - Exchange Details: Offer A for B
Test Steps:
1. Utente proposes new exchange.
2. Exchange saves exchange info in database.
3. Database sends response.
4. Exchange shows exchange list.
Expected Result: New exchange is proposed and saved in the database.

Title: View Exchange List
Test Steps:
1. Utente navigates to the exchange page.
2. Exchange requests exchange data from the database.
3. Database sends response with exchange information.
4. Exchange displays the list of exchanges to the user.
Expected Result: User sees a list of exchanges.

Title: Accept or Reject Exchange Proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in and has received an exchange proposal.
Test Steps:
1. Utente views the exchange list.
2. Exchange retrieves exchange information from the database.
3. Utente clicks on accept/reject button.
4. Exchange requires confirmation from Utente.
5. Utente confirms.
6. Exchange updates exchange status in the database.
Expected Result: Exchange status is updated in the database and reflected in the list.

Title: Filter Items List
Test Steps:
1. Utente sends "Show items list" message to Main.
2. Main retrieves items from the database.
3. Main displays items list to Utente.
4. Utente inserts new filter criteria.
5. Main retrieves filtered items from the database.
6. Main displays filtered items list to Utente.
Expected Result: User sees a filtered list of items based on the specified criteria.

Title: View Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. Utente moves to personal info section.
2. Profile retrieves info from the database.
3. Profile displays info to Utente.
Expected Result: User sees their personal information.

Title: Modify Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. Utente moves to personal info section.
2. Profile retrieves info from the database.
3. Profile displays info to Utente.
4. Utente clicks on modify info.
5. Profile requests new info.
6. Utente inserts new info.
7. Profile saves new info in the database.
8. Profile displays updated info to Utente.
Expected Result: User's personal information is updated and displayed correctly.

Title: Navigate to Home Screen
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. System checks if the user is logged in.
3. If logged in, system directs to the home screen.
Expected Result: User lands on the home screen.

Title: Handle Login/Registration Request
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. System checks if the user is logged in.
3. If not logged in, system prompts for login or registration.
Expected Result: User is prompted to log in or register.

Title: Process Proposals
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. System checks for available data.
3. If data is available, system processes proposals.
4. If proposal is accepted, system proceeds to detail the proposal.
5. If proposal is not accepted, system returns to the proposal list.
Expected Result: Proposals are processed and handled accordingly.

Title: Manage Offers
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. System checks if data from offers is available.
3. If data is available, system lists offers.
4. If data is not available, system returns to the home screen.
5. User attempts to insert an offer.
6. If insertion is successful, system returns to the home screen.
7. If insertion fails, system attempts to delete an offer.
8. If deletion is successful, system returns to the home screen.
9. If deletion fails, system returns to the offer list.
Expected Result: Offers are managed and displayed correctly.

Title: Filter Search Results
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. System checks if data from offers is available.
3. If data is available, system lists offers.
4. If data is not available, system filters search results.
Expected Result: Search results are filtered and displayed correctly.

Title: Visualize Profile
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. User selects to visualize profile.
3. System checks if profile visualization is successful.
4. If successful, system returns to the home screen.
5. If unsuccessful, system redirects to data modification fragment.
Expected Result: Profile is visualized and managed correctly.

Title: Open Saved Elements
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. User opens saved elements.
3. System checks if elements are opened successfully.
4. If successful, system lists elements.
5. If unsuccessful, system redirects to detailed offer activity.
Expected Result: Saved elements are opened and managed correctly.

Title: Handle Element Removal
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. User opens saved elements.
3. System checks if elements are opened successfully.
4. If successful, system lists elements.
5. User attempts to remove an element.
6. System checks if removal is successful.
7. If successful, system ends the process.
8. If unsuccessful, system returns to the element list.
Expected Result: Element removal is handled correctly.

Title: Check Data Availability
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home screen.
2. System checks if data from proposals, offers, or search results is available.
3. If data is available, system processes accordingly.
4. If data is not available, system returns to the home screen.
Expected Result: Data availability is checked and handled correctly.
